title: All Statuses in Group Automation
excerpt: Can we have an automation created where ‘When all ‘STATUS COLUMN’ in ‘GROUP’ change to ‘STATUS’ move items to THIS GROUP’?

posts.author: ToriG (Vitoria Gray)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we have an automation created where ‘When all ‘STATUS COLUMN’ in ‘GROUP’ change to ‘STATUS’ move items to THIS GROUP’?

posts.author: backpackentrepreneur (Thomas Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

There is an option for when all subitems have a status, change an item status, and then move that item to a group. Would that be a workaround?

posts.author: TraceJackson (Trace Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the same exact request. And the workaround that was offered, while clever, doesn’t work for me b/c I already have sub-items. But what I really need is a way to move the entire group-full of items into another Board altogether.

Happy to illustrate use-case if needed.
